text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For an Umamusume, the moment you encounter your racewear is akin
to a date with destiny.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
None believe this more than Beauty Anshinzawa, a designer who dubs
these encounters "engagements" and creates racewear inspired by
wedding dresses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year, she's once again holding the Beauty Dream Cup to decide
who gets to don her latest dresses, and every Umamusume is eager to
try their luck at the auditions.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
A striking black that can't be colored over by someone else... Curren,
your dress really makes your cuteness shine.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You think so? Thanks! ♪ You're pretty cute yourself, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've been really looking forward to this unveiling race. I
can't wait to show everyone the new Curren—the cutest in the
universe!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, you'll have to best me to do that! After all, in this wedding
dress, I have no choice but to give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One month ago, at the Beauty Dream Cup muse audition press
conference...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Beauty, please tell us more about this year's Beauty Dream Cup in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm very excited to meet some new lovely gems! And stay tuned to see
some absolutely stunning wedding dress racewear again this year!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Beauty, am I right to assume that you've prepared another
elaborate audition to select the models that'll wear your racewear and
run in the unveiling race?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Doing the same audition every year would be rather dull, wouldn't it?
A muse is someone who can display brilliance even in the face of
unfamiliar challenges. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That is why... this year, I'll have all my muse candidates take on a
team-based riddle audition!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The theme is, "Those who strive for beauty must also possess
intellect"! I eagerly await the participation of undiscovered
diamonds! ♪

text_block_list.name: Charismatic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey, wanna join my team? I just have to get my hands on one of Beauty Anshinzawa's latest dresses!

text_block_list.name: Peppy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! We promised each other we'd both become muses, and
that's what we're gonna do!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why, everyone is in a right uproar! It appears the audition has fully
captured the attention of all.

text_block_list.name: Captain of Security
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that makes sense. Surely racers themselves would put a lot
of thought into what they wear on the track.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, indeed. Still, how should I put it? Everyone's enthusiasm is far
beyond what I had expected.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Their fervor... It feels as if this means more to them than a simple
article of clothing...)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's Fine! You got some time right now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Greetings, Curren. Is it about the audition, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you know me too well, Fine. That's right—I'm recruiting team
members for the audition!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Fine? The rules say you need five to enter, and I've got
an open spot if you're interested.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In truth, I only intended to spectate... but would you mind if I asked
you a question?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why do you wish to enter the audition? Is your goal the racewear? Or
perhaps you aspire to be a model?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm entering so I can win myself Beauty Anshinzawa's wedding dress
racewear. With that on, I'll definitely be the cutest in the universe!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (So it's the racewear that drives her actions...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Curren, you're planning to go seek out more members,
right? Would you mind if I accompanied you?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the offer. To tell you the truth, I'd been looking to
acquire Ms. Beauty's racewear as well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
From what I've heard, her racewear's functionality and performance
are top-class, to say nothing of her dazzling designs.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Getting that racewear will surely help prolong my running career...
I've decided—I'll work with you to pass the audition!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? You want us to join your team? But... I'll probably just mess
things up for everyone...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Why's that? Come on, let's take on that audition together! Just think
of Ms. Beauty's racewear—twinkly and sooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Rice, didn't you say you've always looked up to these mewsies?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right. When I was little, I saw the Beauty Dream Cup on TV
once...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And everyone watching the muses run in their wedding dresses
looked so happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I remember thinking how nice it was, and from then on, I watched the
cup every year. I even hoped that one day I'd get the chance to be a
muse, too...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Then what're you waiting for?! I wanna run in the Beauty Dream Cup
with you, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'd be a tooon of fun to run with everyone! So let's do it! First
place, here we come!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Y-yeah, you're right! Um, Curren! We accept your offer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Ikuno, Rice, Urara—they all agreed to join my team!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Curren, I found this a little strange, but how did you decide who to
reach out to beforehand?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Instead of looking for any Umamusume interested in the audition, you
were set on Ikuno and the others from the start, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's simple. Those three are just as serious as I am about
winning, that's all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: By "serious," you mean...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's what it sounds like. Take Ikuno, for example. She was interested in
the performance of the racewear, right? Mentioned prolonging her
career. Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno perfectly maintains her cleats, shoes, and other racing
equipment every day. For her, the racewear is another step towards
achieving her goal.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: She's serious about running for as long as she can.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And Rice, she's been interested in the muses for a long time. To her,
they're Umamusume who can bring smiles to everyone watching.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Rather than the racewear's design, Rice is more interested in making
the people around her smile. And I believe that wish of hers is the
real deal.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
As for Urara, her desire to run with everyone is pure and genuine,
stronger than anyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I want to get my hands on the universe's cutest racewear, then I
couldn't ask for a better team, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(She really thought this through... To think racewear could mean so
much to so many...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Captain? Upon discovering everyone's aspirations, I have determined
it my duty to help them realize those ambitions. As such, may I have
your permission to join them?

text_block_list.name: Captain of Security
text_block_list.text:
This year's audition will be judged based on "intellect." Riddles are
unlikely to pose any danger, so there should be no problem with your
participation.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Curren, I have an earnest request to make of you. Would you please
allow me to join your team for the audition?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Geez! You're always so dense when it comes to important stuff like
this, Fine! Remember who I invited first?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were the first person I thought of to recruit for the audition! ♪
Anyways, we're a team now, so let's show 'em what we've got!
